import requests
import json

# 获取会议记录详情
note_id = "note_001"
response = requests.post(
    "http://localhost:53303/notes/get",
    json={"note_id": note_id}
)
print("=== 会议记录详情 ===")
print("Status:", response.status_code)
data = response.json()
print(json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2))

# 验证是否已分享给参会人
print("\n=== 验证分享状态 ===")
recipients = ["张经理", "李明", "王芳", "赵强"]
for r in recipients:
    share_response = requests.post(
        "http://localhost:53303/notes/share",
        json={"note_id": note_id, "recipients": [r]}
    )
    print(f"分享给 {r}: {share_response.status_code}")
    if share_response.status_code == 200:
        print(f"  {share_response.json()}")
